jsonLd.title: CCAvenue is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at CCAvenue are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CCAvenue:
CCAvenue is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CCAvenue!
